description: Tinker is Thinking Machines Lab's training and sampling API for open-weight models. Its OpenAI-compatible inference endpoint is currently documented as beta and intended for testing and internal workflows.
prompt_training_notes: Thinking Machines says customer data is used solely to fine-tune customer models and is not used to train its own models.
regional_pricing_notes: Thinking Machines publishes a single public USD rate card for Tinker model sampling and training.
